source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for refined English product UI with crisp metrics and Japanese typography guidance suited to koi pond ornament.
layout: Orderly dashboard grids, 8px cards, scale textures, ripple dividers, and ornamental-but-practical navigation.

prompts.label: Transparent koi fish motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Koi Fish transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a koi fish scales motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A graceful koi fish with porcelain-white scales, vermilion-orange kohaku markings, sumi-black accents, visible scale rows, flowing fins, jade water reflected highlights, and ornamental pond-fish anatomy. It must read as koi, not goldfish, carp food fish, salmon, or betta.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include head, fins, body, tail, scale pattern, and markings without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no goldfish bowl, no pond background, no lotus, no extra fish, no dragon imagery, no props, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Koi Fish light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Koi Fish", derived from the visible koi fish scales cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Koi Fish, Koi Fish Scales, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from porcelain-white koi scales, vermilion-orange markings, sumi-black accent patches, jade pond reflections, pearl scale highlights, pond-green status tones, and deep pond shadow. The board must read as koi, not goldfish, salmon, or betta.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible with refined ornamental spacing.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: ornamental dashboard system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, porcelain surfaces, kohaku-orange primary actions, sumi-black text and focus, water-jade controls, pond-green success, scale texture panels, ripple dividers, restrained shadows.
Constraints: no goldfish theme, no salmon run, no betta fins, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Koi Fish", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Koi Fish dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Koi Fish". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible koi fish scales cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Koi Fish, Koi Fish Scales, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same koi system language as the visible light board: deep pond panels, porcelain text, kohaku-orange actions, sumi-black structure, water-jade controls, pond-green statuses, scale texture, ripple dividers, and precise shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible on dark pond surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep pond and sumi panels, porcelain foreground, orange active states, jade focus rings, pond-green success, pearl scale highlights, subtle water ripple texture, crisp 8px cards.
Constraints: no goldfish, no salmon, no betta, no neon aquarium colors, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Koi Fish", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
